---
title: "In Class Exercise 1"
author: "Joshua TING"
date: "August 26, 2024"
date-modified: "last-modified"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code Chunk"
    number-sections: true
execute:
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
  message: false
editor: source
---

# **1. In Class Exercise 1**

## **1.1**
